issue_title: Cursor style glitching when drawing polygons
issue_body_preview: Leaflet defines the style for .leaflet-interact as cursor: pointer, but Geoman has the style for .cursor-marker as pointer: crosshair. Depending on where the user's cursor lands while they are drawing a polygon, the cursor continues to flip between the two depending on whether the browser decides th
test_description_zh: 在地图上启用多边形绘制模式，开始绘制多边形（点击放置第一个顶点后），在地图上移动鼠标观察光标样式，特别注意在已放置的顶点标记附近移动时光标的表现。
expected_result_zh: 在绘制多边形过程中，鼠标光标应始终保持为十字准星（crosshair）样式，不应在指针（pointer）和十字准星之间频繁闪烁切换。
